scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5187 dist/main/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5187 nodemon --watch dist/main --ext js --exec "electron ."
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run clean:artifacts && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run clean:artifacts && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run clean:artifacts && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run clean:artifacts && electron-builder --linux
